title: euphorbia repetita
intro: Euphorbia repetita, also known as the 'candelabra euphorbia' due to its unique branching growth habit, is a succulent plant species native to southern Africa. This plant contains a milky sap that has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Euphorbia repetita has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, wounds, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, salves, and tinctures, which can be used topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
